channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: volcengine / OpenViking
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #1
OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
Language: Python 1,557 stars today

item.title: dimensionalOS / dimos
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #3
The Dimensional Framework
Language: Python 64 stars today

item.title: p-e-w / heretic
item.description:

Fully automatic censorship removal for language models
Language: Python 661 stars today

item.title: anthropics / claude-plugins-official
item.description:
📈 Rank: #12 → #2 (↑10) | ⭐ Stars: 10,763 → 11,264 (+501)

Language: Python 411 stars today

item.title: langflow-ai / openrag
item.description:
📉 Rank: #2 → #5 (↓3) | ⭐ Stars: 2,225 → 2,694 (+469)
OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.
Language: Python 568 stars today

item.title: lightpanda-io / browser

item.title: msitarzewski / agency-agents
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 39,881 → 43,611 (+3730) | Ranked #7
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
Language: Shell 4,329 stars today
